publishNote: Build: node scripts/build-stakeholder-review.mjs. Host on Netlify (netlify.toml) so comments save in-portal. Email Mike/Nick yourself when you add or update an asset — not on each comment.
commentsApiNote: Optional full URL if review page is on Webflow but API is on Netlify. Leave empty when the whole site is on Netlify.
messagingDocsNote: Populated at build from messaging-sources.json + OneDrive .docx (see scripts/sync-messaging-docs.mjs)

dueForReview.title: The Signal · Newsletter Hub
dueForReview.summary: Newsletter hub — layout, featured issue, archive.

reviewBrief.description: The Signal hub is the customer-facing home for our newsletter—one stable place to find every issue as we publish.
reviewBrief.reviewAsk: overall look and feel, and any design suggestions before we promote it.

dueForReview.title: The Signal · Issue 01 (June 2026)
dueForReview.summary: Issue 01 — tone, Ameristar story, platform, team, playbook.

reviewBrief.description: Issue 01 is the first full web edition of The Signal—welcome, field story, platform preview, team, playbook, and services.
reviewBrief.reviewAsk: the sections with instructions, steps, or services—confirm we've explained them correctly.

dueForReview.title: Case Study · Ameristar Council Bluffs
dueForReview.summary: Ameristar case study — narrative, results, CTA.

reviewBrief.description: The Ameristar case study is the long-form Council Bluffs relocation and LUCI rollout story for the website, sales, and export.
reviewBrief.reviewAsk: accuracy and story—whether we represented everything correctly.
